name: Page
goal: Provide outer page chrome with header, main, nav rail, and footer areas via CSS grid template-areas.
description: Layout primitive that wraps an entire page in a CSS grid with named areas: header (top), nav (sidebar rail, position depends on layout), main (default slot), and footer (bottom). Supports three layouts: stacked (single-column default), sidebar-left, and sidebar-right. Sidebar layouts collapse to stacked below 48rem. Sticky header and sticky footer are opt-in boolean flags. Rail width is configurable via the rail-width attribute.

props.name: layout
props.description: Page layout variant. stacked is single-column; sidebar-left puts the nav rail on the left; sidebar-right puts the nav rail on the right.

props.name: stickyHeader
props.description: When set, the header area becomes position:sticky at top:0.

props.name: stickyFooter
props.description: When set, the footer area becomes position:sticky at bottom:0.

props.name: railWidth
props.description: CSS length for the nav rail column width (e.g. '16rem', '260px'). Falls back to 16rem when unset.

slots.name: header
slots.description: Top chrome — spans full width in all layout variants.

slots.name: nav
slots.description: Sidebar or rail content — placed left or right of main depending on layout.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Bottom chrome — spans full width in all layout variants.

cssVariables.name: --ce-page-collapse
cssVariables.description: Breakpoint at which sidebar layouts collapse to stacked. Documented for theme authors; the hardcoded CSS breakpoint is 48rem (CSS custom properties cannot be used in @media queries).

cssVariables.name: --ce-page-rail-width
cssVariables.description: Width of the nav/sidebar column. Set as an inline custom property when rail-width attribute is provided; fallback is 16rem.

cssVariables.name: --ce-page-header-z
cssVariables.description: z-index for the header area wrapper. Default 10.

cssVariables.name: --ce-page-footer-z
cssVariables.description: z-index for the footer area wrapper. Default 10.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bg
cssVariables.description: Page background (applied by consumer or theme to the host if desired).

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Page text color (applied by consumer or theme to the host if desired).

a11y.notes: Uses semantic HTML landmark wrappers inside shadow DOM (div with grid-area). Consumer is expected to supply actual landmark elements (<header>, <nav>, <main>, <footer>) as slot content. This component does not impose landmark semantics on the slotted content.
